differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., diffuse large B-cell lymphoma or MALT lymphoma)
Pleural involvement by primary lung malignancy (adenocarcinoma)
next_steps: Flow cytometry of pleural fluid for immunophenotyping
Pleural fluid cytology and cell block for immunohistochemistry
CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis with contrast
Serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chains
Image-guided pleural biopsy if initial studies are non-diagnostic
